title: Campfire Time!
description: Campfire Time! is a mod which adds the ability for a campfire to turn Day into Night (it doesn't work the other way). Want to fight monsters but you don't want to wait? This mod if for you!
body:
**Campfire Time!** is a mod which adds the ability for a campfire to turn Day into Night (it doesn't work the other way). Want to fight monsters but you don't want to wait? This mod if for you!

How to use this feature?
At daytime, right-click with an empty slot to open the timewarp menu, there you can click on **"TIMEWARP"** button and skip the day.

![Right-clicking at a campfire in daytime opens a Timewarp GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45e70a625b9f00085169eca2daa99efe59823530.png)
